official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound ticking_state body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns ticking_state to packet id 0x7f.
The official ticking_state body is float tickRate followed by boolean isFrozen.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, primitive fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer TickRateManager runtime semantics.
